ignore: file splitting without a concrete change reason
adding a usecase package before real API integration
private type relocation that does not reduce coupling

high: a page or design-system component mixes external API policy, validation, stateful orchestration, and detailed JSX in a way that makes current behavior risky to change
medium: stateful page flow, callback wiring, and pure validation/formatting are mixed enough that the next feature change will touch multiple unrelated responsibilities
design-system code contains service-specific domain names or page-only policies
a design-system public export accidentally drops an intended domain field such as AddressField or IdDocumentField
low: the module mostly works but would benefit from incremental VM hook, utils, or core extraction
